summary: Frontend testing of 'Quick Style' (تنسيق سريع) button added to floating toolbar in daily sessions prayer area map. All 6 test cases passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and well-structured. FloatingStyleButton component properly uses useState for popover control with stopPropagation to prevent map interaction conflicts.
handleUpdateZoneStyle is correctly wired through DailySessionsPage -> MapCanvas -> FloatingToolbar -> FloatingStyleButton.
The live preview SVG correctly reflects fill color, opacity, stroke color, stroke width, and stroke style in real-time.
seed_data_creation: Used existing session: جولة الأربعاء 4 مارس 2026 (طابق البدروم, 60 zones, draft status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Quick Style' (تنسيق سريع) floating toolbar button is fully implemented and working. It is located at data-testid='float-style-btn' and opens a Popover with: 10 quick color swatches, fill color picker (input type=color), opacity slider, border color picker, border width slider, 4 border style buttons (float-stroke-solid/dashed/dotted/dash-dot), and a live SVG preview. No JS errors. All 5 floating toolbar buttons are present. Session used for testing: /daily-sessions > March 4 calendar date.
